title: Choba Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Choba, with a Z-Score of +3.43. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Choba is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.0 GG. 
 The high temperature is combined with high humidity, at 79%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is relatively low, at 4.0 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately
